sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67914" key="micarxage/tas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μιξ-αρχᾱγέτας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, Arg. name of Castor, as being <sense id="n67914.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a tribe-hero</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀρχαγέτας</etym>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">only in union with</tr_> his brother, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.296f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
